front: I need help with my homework.
Of course, I will help you.
What would you like to eat?
I would like a sandwich and juice.
I would like to buy this shirt.
Yes, we accept all major cards.
back: نعم، نحن نقبل جميع البطاقات الرئيسية.

front: The fitting room is over there.
I am looking for a gift.
I have a birthday party tonight.
Thank you for the birthday present.
back: شكرًا لك على هدية عيد الميلاد.

front: I had a wonderful time at the party.
back: لقد قضيت وقتًا رائعًا في الحفلة.

front: It is two kilometers from here.
How do I get to the airport?
You can take a taxi or a bus.
back: يمكنك أن تأخذ سيارة أجرة أو حافلة.

front: I would like a round trip ticket.

back: القطار يغادر في الساعة الخامسة مساءً.

front: Is there a restaurant on the train?
Yes, the dining car is at the back.
There is luggage space above your seat.
I would like to check into a hotel.
Do you have any available rooms?
How many nights will you stay?
I will stay for three nights.
What is the price per night?
It is one hundred pounds per night.
I need a double bed room.
Yes, the pool is on the roof.

back: المغادرة في الساعة الحادية عشرة صباحًا.

front: Yes, if we have available rooms.
back: نعم، إن كان لدينا غرف متاحة.

front: What is the best restaurant here?
It is better to call ahead.
Do they have a guided tour?
I would like to take a tour.
Yes, there is a gift shop at the exit.
back: نعم، هناك متجر هدايا عند المخرج.

front: There is a café over there.
What would you like to drink?
I would like a coffee please.
Do you want sugar in your coffee?
Do you know how to make pasta?
Yes, I go to the gym three times a week.
back: نعم، أذهب إلى الصالة الرياضية ثلاث مرات في الأسبوع.

front: When do you usually wake up?
I go to bed around 11 PM.
back: أنام حوالي الساعة الحادية عشرة ليلًا.

front: How many hours of sleep do you need?
The weather is perfect for a walk.
I see birds in the trees.
I have a small garden at home.
I have a dog and a cat.
I love spending time with my pets.
back: أحب قضاء الوقت مع حيواناتي الأليفة.

front: Yes, I watch movies on weekends.
back: نعم، أشاهد الأفلام في نهاية الأسبوع.

front: I read books in my free time.
What kind of books do you read?
I am reading a great book now.
I love the work of Agatha Christie.
Do you play any musical instruments?
back: هل تعزف على أي آلات موسيقية؟

front: How long have you been playing guitar?
I have been playing for five years.
I listen to music every day.
What kind of music do you prefer?
I like to sing in the shower.
I use my computer every day.
Yes, I use Facebook and Twitter.
How many followers do you have?
I have about five thousand followers.
I like to share photos online.
I post about travel and food.
I write a blog about cooking.
How often do you update your blog?
I update it once a week.
How many emails do you receive daily?
I receive about twenty emails a day.
back: أستقبل حوالي عشرين بريدًا إلكترونيًا يوميًا.

front: Yes, I need to delete old emails.
back: نعم، أحتاج إلى حذف رسائل البريد القديمة.

front: What time do you start work?

back: أبدأ العمل في الساعة التاسعة صباحًا.

front: Do you have a lunch break?
Yes, I have a one-hour break.
I eat lunch at a restaurant near my office.
back: أتناول الغداء في مطعم بالقرب من مكتبي.

front: I bring my lunch from home.
Yes, they are friendly and helpful.
I have traveled to many countries.
Which country did you visit last?
What is your favorite place there?
Have you been to the Eiffel Tower?
Of course, let me show you.
I am planning a trip next month.
back: أنا أخطط لرحلة في الشهر القادم.

front: I am planning to visit Italy.
I will stay for two weeks.
Not yet, I am still looking.
back: ليس بعد، أنا لا أزال أبحث.

front: I can recommend a good hotel.
Have you learned anything new today?
back: هل تعلمت أي شيء جديد اليوم؟

front: Yes, I learned many new words.
back: نعم، تعلمت الكثير من الكلمات الجديدة.
